PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?awardingBodyLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q40640 wdt:P166 wd:Q7259350 .
  wd:Q7259350 wdt:P1433 ?awardingBody .
  ?awardingBody rdfs:label ?awardingBodyLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?awardingBodyLabel) = "en")
}
